semanticChecks.message: Account should be constructible with owner and balance.
Store owner and balance as instance attributes.
deposit should update the balance and return the new balance.

exercises.starterCode:
# main.py
from models.account import Account

account = Account("Leo", 120)
account.balance = account.balance - 30
print(account.balance)

semanticChecks.message: Account should be constructible with owner and balance.
withdraw should subtract the amount and return the new balance.
The program should still print a result from main.py.
Account should be constructible with owner and balance.
summary should return the formatted account text.
The class method should return text rather than printing it directly.
format_dollars should return a dollar-formatted string.
summary should use the helper-formatted balance.
The helper and method should return values instead of printing.
